message:
fix(freeze): handle string concatenation in frozen add operations

The CV.add function only handled numeric addition (int+int, float+float),
causing string concatenation in frozen functions to return numbers instead
of concatenated strings.

Added CV.addWithCtx that:
- Fast path for integer and float addition (same as before)
- Detects strings via isStr() and concatenates using JS_ToString + JS_NewStringLen
- Falls back to numeric conversion for other types

Updated codegen to use addWithCtx in three places:
- Expression-based add (relooper path)
- Stack-based add (stack machine path)
- add_loc opcode (local variable accumulation)
